flint:name: ZorgtoeslagIncomeThreshold
flint:description: Annual income of the applicant must not exceed the statutory threshold for Zorgtoeslag eligibility under Awb Art. 5(1).
flint:salvageClause: Applicant income exceeds the threshold for Zorgtoeslag (€37,496). Application must be rejected and applicant notified per Art. 4:5 Awb.
